feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Authorizations ME51N - I want to disable Save Action
entry.content:
Hello community , 

in my role i have transactions ME51N/ME52N/ME53N.

I want to disable on users to make Save - Create PR , but i want to have access to Hold / Park the PR 

How to disable the Save Button Activity ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Include Workflow tasks in authorization role on productive system
entry.content:
Hello,

we built a new authorization role on the S/4 development system including several workflow tasks.
After transport of the role into our test system, the workflow components were not included in the role anymore and had to be added manually in PFCG.

This is okay for the test system. But our authorizations are strictly limited on the productive system and no one is allowed to change roles on the productive system directly.

How can we achive a transport of the role including the workflow tasks, or is there any other solution to add these to the role?

Thanks,

Julia

entry.title: Want to disable or restrict the CTRL + N shortcut to prevent creating a new session in SAP
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We have implemented two-factor authentication, in which ,   the user logs in and an OTP popup is triggered. The OTP is sent to the respective mobile number and email. Once the OTP is entered, the user can access SAP. However,    a popup appears, and if the user presses CTRL + N, a new session opens and the POPup gets bypassed. This issue cannot be handled as it is not triggered during debugging, so we are unable to restrict or disable it.  Kindly give us any hint, as to how we can solve this issue. 

Regards,

Mehak

entry.title: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help with your inputs on the below case.

We have one HANA Stored Procedure. This is a directly created as a Catalog object by some Developer & that got migrated to Production as well.  He is the Owner of that Procedure , as its created by his ID.

Now that Developer has left the Organization , we want to grant that Procedure ( Catalog object) with EXECUTE privilege to some Technical ID which needs to call that procedure from external system ( ex: Informatica).

How can we assign that access to that technical ID , as the Developer is no longer available? 

In this case SYSTEM user also will not have access to grant access to other except the Owner.

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content:
Hi,

inside the RIAFRU20 report enanchment I have to read the RSTXT-TXLINE field 

 

I have already tried the FM READ_TEXT but it wants the "Name" as input, I don't know the "Name" inside the enhancement 

how can i do?

entry.title: Access Restriction for TPM60 Transaction
entry.content:
Hi,
I got a request to restrict TPM60 transaction access only to allow test run. I've limited all the authorizations to display only but still when we execute it without test run it is updating the NPV's. Can any one help me on how to restrict the access only to allow for test run.


Thank you in advance.


Best Regards,
Sumanth P

entry.title: USMM2 measurment 1160 fails with error You are not authorized to execute this program.
entry.content:
In my monthly run of USMM2 in a SAP ERP 7.50 system, the Measurement of application 1160 ("SAP Solutions by OpenText") fails with an error "You are not authorized to execute this program." (Message no. /OTX/PF09_M_001023). Apparently this is a new measurement, because it is not present in last month's report. 
In september we updated component OTEXVIM to version 80700_006, SP 0005.
Did anyone else encounter the same error and have any idea how to solve the authorization issue?

entry.title: No Where-Used List for the Authorization Object in SE80/SU21 after S/4 HANA 2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
After the system upgrade from S/4 HANA 2021 to S/4 HANA 2023, the Where-Used List for authorization objects in SE80/SU21 disappeared.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Same profile naming in development and quality systems
entry.content:
Hi,
SHD an SHQ were our development and quality systems, but now, we have a new system:
SDH (development system)
SQH (quality System)
So, when we created new role and a new profile is assigned automatically in old systems, this profile name was T-SDxxxxxx (DEV) and T-SQxxx (QAS) respectively.
Now, when we create new roles and profiles automatically in new systems, the profile name begins with same nomenclature T-SHxxxx and it is generating incidents.
Could you please help us with this issue?
Is these any OSS Note to apply? or could you tell us how change the beginning of the profile name T-YYxxxxx?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can set authorization for restricted report by PR/PO Document Type
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to restrict the authorization of using report each user by restricted the PR/PO document type.

How can I set authorization for this?

 

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: Massive clean-up of old email addresses in SU01
entry.content: Is there a way in SAP to clean-up old email addresses in SU01 in bulk?

entry.title: we require non expiry sap user ID for the interface with other software's
entry.content:
Hi,


we are using the SAP user id to post the interface data in to the sap and we maintained the sap user id and password in the all interface API and CPI to post the data in sap s4 PERSON_NAME. but every 6 months sap user id password is expiring due to that interfaces are failing.


we required non expiry password for SAP user id to use in the interface.


 


Regards,


Manjunatha Reddy.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EHS role Restriction by sublocations
entry.content:
Greetings, community,

We have a client  who wishes to implement specific role restrictions in EHS within their location hierarchy. The objective is to ensure that certain roles have access only to certain sublocations, without any visibility into their parent sites or higher levels in the hierarchy.

We have experimented with authorization groups to enforce these restrictions. However, this approach does not allow for the inclusion of child locations without also granting access to their parent sites.

Can anyone suggest alternative solutions or best practices on how to effectively achieve this configuration within the system? Your insights would be greatly appreciated.

#EHS #locations #authorization #roles #restriction #sublocation

entry.title: PFCG: indirect user assignments cannot be manually changed
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

When we try to remove user assignment from roles, we have encountered that "Indirect user assignments cannot be manually changed" and cannot proceed further.

Message number S#082.

Please help us to fix this issue.

 

Regards,

 

Basis Team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Remove button in SU10 without using Screen Personas
entry.content:
Hi,
Our team wants to remove the button for editing single user in tcode SU01.
They say that the only way to achieve this is to install Screen Personas add-on.
However, we in the Basis team are wondering if another solution exist, to avoid having to install an new add-on just to remove 1 button in SU10.
See attachment to view the relevant button.
 
Do you know of another solution for this?
Thanks.
 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to check which Auth Checks a program in SAP does
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am looking for a way on how to find all AUTHORITY-CHECKs for a given transaction, report or Fiori App without manually looking through the code.

I have encountered countless situations where I added a new tile for a transaction or Fiori app and then user complained about not having access to certain information because of missing authorization settings in their role. PFCG is already a powerfull tool but doesn't always catch all auth checks since it (afaik) relies on presets for the auth objects in the SAP system.

Recently we added a 3rd party software from a company to our collection and it was my duty to create all the new tiles. Since I am getting tired of "maintaining PFCG, transport role, user complains, check SU53, maintain PFCG again, transport again, rinse and repeat" I would like to ask: Is there a already implemented transaction by SAP that I can give a transaction or report name and it spits out all the auth checks so I have a list  of "all auth checks for that report"?.

Thanks!

entry.title: My Inbox Fiori App Performance Issue Due Reading unnecessary Work Items in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have implemented the My Inbox Fiori application in our S/4HANA system, where multiple workflow tasks  are configured for decisions like leave requests and service entries. However, we are facing a performance issue: the My Inbox app takes an unusually long time to load, even for just four line items.

Our technical consultant investigated the issue and found that the app is reading a significant amount of data from CATSDB work items in the backend. These CATSDB entries contain numerous line items, which seems to be causing the delay.

Since CATSDB-relevant data is not required in our My Inbox application, we are looking for a solution to exclude or filter out this data to improve the app's performance.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? How can we prevent My Inbox from reading unnecessary CATSDB work items or optimize the data retrieval process? Any advice, configuration tips, or notes would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Email triggered by SOST adds a prefix to link
entry.content:
I'm sending and email by SOST which has a link to its body in this pattern:

|<a href='https://sample.site.com.br/ '> https://sample.site.com.br/</a> | 

However, when I open this email message and click on this link by SOST or email box, it has a kind of SAP HTML Viewer prefix:

saphtmlp://htmlviewer.sap.com/mVBy5V6l7k{ltUSr8nfZYk/' https://sample.site.com.br/ '

Do you know where can I configure it in order to remove this HTML Viewer link?

 saphtmlp://htmlviewer.sap.com/mVBy5V6l7k{ltUSr8nfZYk/' '

entry.title: Authorization restriction based on multi-level categorization in Interaction Record
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I hope you are doing well!

I have question regarding Authorization Concept in Interaction Records. My Client has implemented multi-level categorization for interaction records in CRM. However, now they need that these categorization should be restricted per BU Roles.

For e.g. BU Role 1 get access to all the 50 Categories, while creating the IR. But BU Role 2 gets access to only 25 Categories.

I am already familiar with the concept of Authorization for e.g. mentioned here https://help.sap.com/saphelp_crm60/helpdata/en/4a/b9f63a8ab2c745e10000000a114084/frameset.htm

However, I did not find anything specific to Multi-Level Categorization.

Please help me with this query.

entry.title: Difference bettween actitivies 01, 10 and 22 for authorization object F_BKPF_BUK
entry.content:
HI, 

Can somebody explain me process wise the difference between the following activities for authorization object F_BKPF_BUK?

  • 01 - Create
  • 10  - Post
  • 22 - Enter, Include Assign

Many thanks

  •
